title: Bridge Essay: An exploratory study of breathwork-induced altered states of consciousness in ex

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Breathwork-induced altered states — systematic characterization of mystical-type experiences through voluntary hyperventilation

**An exploratory study of breathwork-induced altered states of consciousness in experienced practitioners: the airways to alteration (A2A) trial.**. Frontiers in psychology. (2026). PMID: 42359292. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1851882. BACKGROUND: Breathwork that increases ventilatory rate or depth represents an accessible non-pharmacological modality for potentially inducing altered states of consciousness (ASCs). Despite gaining traction as apotential therapeutic tool, empirical controlled research on breathwork and ASCs remains limited.
